completed_steps.summary: Loaded documentation requirements for 12 project types
No existing docs found, set workflow_mode=initial_scan, scan_level=exhaustive
Classified as monorepo with 2 parts (backend: Python agents, frontend: Electron/React desktop app)
Found 10+ existing docs (README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, RELEASE.md, CLAUDE.md, guides/)
Tech stack: Electron 40 + React 19 + TypeScript 5.9 + Python 3.10+ + Claude Agent SDK
Exhaustive scan complete: 39 IPC handlers, 29 Zustand stores, 160+ Python files, 16 CI workflows
Source tree documented with annotated critical folders
Dev setup, deployment, and contribution guides extracted
Integration architecture: IPC bridge, PTY daemon socket, Python subprocess spawning
Architecture docs written for both parts
Master index generated with links to all 8 docs + existing docs
Validation complete, no incomplete markers, all files generated

findings.project_classification: Monorepo with 2 parts: Python backend (agents, CLI, security) + Electron/React frontend (desktop UI)
findings.technology_stack: Electron 40, React 19, TypeScript 5.9, Python 3.10+, Claude Agent SDK, Zustand 5, Tailwind CSS v4, Radix UI, xterm.js 6
findings.architecture: Three-process Electron (main/preload/renderer) + Python subprocess agent system with IPC bridge
findings.ci_cd: 16 GitHub Actions workflows: cross-platform CI, code signing (macOS notarization, Azure Trusted Signing), security scanning (CodeQL, Bandit, VirusTotal)

resume_instructions: Workflow fully completed. All 12 steps finished. 9 documentation files generated.
